one_line_description: SEO platform (rank tracking, backlinks, audits, keyword research) with a Data API and a Project API.
auth_summary: API key created in the account's API Dashboard, sent as 'Authorization: Token YOUR_API_KEY' (or a token parameter). One key authenticates both the Data API and Project API.
access_notes: Fetched official 'Getting API access' page: all current paid plans (Essential, Pro, Business, Core, Growth, Enterprise) include Data API access with monthly credit allowances (10k-100k); keys are self-generated from the API Dashboard once subscribed. No free API tier documented.
api_surface_summary: Two REST APIs: Data API (keyword/SERP data, backlinks, website audit, etc., credit-metered) and Project API (manage projects/rankings against subscription limits). Rate limit 5 req/s.
main_blocker: API credentials require an active paid SE Ranking subscription; no free developer tier.
agent_notes: Docs are open and clear; official MCP page exists in their API docs. Once a customer has any paid plan the integration itself is straightforward key-based auth, so this is buildable for paying users.
